modules.description: Software Testing Life Cycle (STLC), Test Plans, Test Cases, Bug Reports.

modules.title: Test Case Design Techniques
modules.description: Equivalence Partitioning, Boundary Value Analysis, Decision Tables, State Transition.

modules.title: Manual & Exploratory Testing
modules.description: Functional, regression, smoke, sanity, ad-hoc, and usability testing.

modules.title: SQL for Quality Assurance Testers
modules.description: SQL queries to verify database state, data integrity, and backend test validation.

modules.title: API Testing with Postman & Newman
modules.description: REST API testing, status codes, assertions, environment variables, Postman runner.

modules.title: Automation Fundamentals (Python / Java)
modules.description: Programming fundamentals for QA automation engineers in Python or Java.

modules.title: Web UI Automation (Selenium / Playwright)
modules.description: Locators, Page Object Model (POM), element waits, and browser automation.

modules.title: CI/CD Integration for QA Automation
modules.description: Run automated test suites inside GitHub Actions / Jenkins pipelines.

modules.title: Performance & Load Testing (JMeter)
modules.description: Performance test plan design, thread groups, latency, throughput, and JMeter reports.

modules.title: Agile QA & Quality Operations
modules.description: Jira, Xray/Zephyr integration, Agile QA practices, and continuous testing.

description: Master scalable system design, distributed systems, high availability, and architecture.

modules.title: System Design Fundamentals & Metrics
modules.description: Scalability (vertical vs horizontal), Latency vs Throughput, CAP Theorem.

modules.title: Load Balancing & Domain Name Routing
modules.description: DNS routing, Layer 4 vs Layer 7 load balancers, Round Robin, Least Connections.

modules.title: Caching Strategies & In-Memory Stores
modules.description: Redis, Memcached, Cache-Aside, Write-Through, Write-Back, Eviction policies (LRU).

modules.title: Database Scaling & Sharding
modules.description: Replication (Master-Slave), Sharding keys, Consistent Hashing, Database Read Replicas.

modules.title: Message Queues & Event-Driven Architecture
modules.description: Kafka, RabbitMQ, Asynchronous tasks, Publish/Subscribe, Event Sourcing.

modules.title: Distributed Storage Systems & CDN
modules.description: Object storage (S3), Content Delivery Networks (CDN), Block vs Object storage.

modules.title: Microservices Architecture & API Gateways
modules.description: Service decomposition, API Gateway pattern, Circuit Breakers, Service Mesh.

modules.title: Rate Limiting & Security Infrastructure
modules.description: Token Bucket, Leaky Bucket, Fixed Window, Distributed Rate Limiting.

modules.title: High Availability & Fault Tolerance
modules.description: Redundancy, Health checks, Failover mechanisms, Heartbeats, Consensus (Raft/Paxos).

modules.title: Real-World System Design Case Studies
modules.description: Design Uber, Netflix, Twitter Feed, URL Shortener, and Distributed Chat.
